description:
A feature-rich College Management System built using React.js and Express.js.
This project is designed for academic use, real-world learning, and full-stack skill enhancement.

A File Sharing System built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with Cloudinary integration for handling file URLs. This project is part of my practice and learning, selected from the college project list.

SmartPark is a full-stack MERN-based parking management system designed to solve real-world urban parking challenges. It provides real-time parking slot availability, smart booking, and a powerful admin dashboard with a clean and responsive user experience.

Climate Shield is an AI-powered climate intelligence platform that provides real-time weather monitoring and climate risk analysis. It helps users detect potential flood and heatwave threats using live weather data such as temperature, humidity, rainfall, and wind speed. The platform generates instant alerts, risk scores, and weather insights for any location entered by the user. It also includes ClimateBot, an interactive AI chatbot that offers climate awareness, disaster preparedness guidance, flood precautions, cyclone safety tips, and heatwave protection advice. Built with Python, Flask, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, Climate Shield aims to improve climate awareness and support safer, faster decision-making during extreme weather conditions.
